close_reason: Taxonomy defined: comprehension/implementation/quality. Mapped all 20 suites and 477 tasks. Manifest: 40/37/23% split. configs/task_type_taxonomy.json + task_type field on all tasks.

title: Define task-type taxonomy: comprehension / implementation / quality

title: Build deterministic verifiers for promoted Org tasks

The curator agent already produces ground_truth.json with files/symbols for every task. This makes SDLC tasks directly comparable with Org tasks on retrieval metrics.
title: Add IR/retrieval scoring layer to SDLC tasks

title: Rebuild unified manifest with power-optimized task-type balance
